import bpy, json, os, math
ROOT = r"C:\Users\sysro\diag\CsharpModVScode"
OUT = os.path.join(ROOT, "anm", "reference-fk-arm-limits-scan.json")
NAMES = [
    'upper_arm_fk.L','forearm_fk.L','hand_fk.L','upper_arm_fk.R','forearm_fk.R','hand_fk.R',
    'ORG-upper_arm.L','ORG-forearm.L','ORG-hand.L','ORG-upper_arm.R','ORG-forearm.R','ORG-hand.R'
]

def cinfo(c):
    d = {
        'name': c.name,
        'type': c.type,
        'mute': bool(getattr(c, 'mute', False)),
        'influence': float(getattr(c, 'influence', 0.0)),
        'owner_space': getattr(c, 'owner_space', None),
        'target_space': getattr(c, 'target_space', None),
    }
    for attr in [
        'use_limit_x','use_limit_y','use_limit_z',
        'min_x','max_x','min_y','max_y','min_z','max_z',
        'use_transform_limit','target','subtarget','mix_mode'
    ]:
        if hasattr(c, attr):
            v = getattr(c, attr)
            if hasattr(v, 'name'):
                v = v.name
            if isinstance(v, float):
                v = float(v)
            d[attr] = v
    return d

result = {'file': bpy.data.filepath, 'bones': []}
for obj in bpy.data.objects:
    if obj.type != 'ARMATURE' or not obj.pose:
        continue
    for name in NAMES:
        pb = obj.pose.bones.get(name)
        if not pb:
            continue
        result['bones'].append({
            'object': obj.name,
            'bone': name,
            'rotation_mode': pb.rotation_mode,
            'lock_rotation': [bool(x) for x in pb.lock_rotation],
            'lock_rotation_w': bool(getattr(pb, 'lock_rotation_w', False)),
            'lock_ik_x': bool(getattr(pb, 'lock_ik_x', False)),
            'lock_ik_y': bool(getattr(pb, 'lock_ik_y', False)),
            'lock_ik_z': bool(getattr(pb, 'lock_ik_z', False)),
            'use_ik_limit_x': bool(getattr(pb, 'use_ik_limit_x', False)),
            'use_ik_limit_y': bool(getattr(pb, 'use_ik_limit_y', False)),
            'use_ik_limit_z': bool(getattr(pb, 'use_ik_limit_z', False)),
            'ik_min_x': float(getattr(pb, 'ik_min_x', 0.0)),
            'ik_max_x': float(getattr(pb, 'ik_max_x', 0.0)),
            'ik_min_y': float(getattr(pb, 'ik_min_y', 0.0)),
            'ik_max_y': float(getattr(pb, 'ik_max_y', 0.0)),
            'ik_min_z': float(getattr(pb, 'ik_min_z', 0.0)),
            'ik_max_z': float(getattr(pb, 'ik_max_z', 0.0)),
            'constraints': [cinfo(c) for c in pb.constraints],
        })

os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(OUT), exist_ok=True)
with open(OUT, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump(result, f, indent=2)
RESULT = {'file': result['file'], 'bones': result['bones'], 'report': OUT}
